etymology.description: 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") as semantic + 冎(冎) as phonetic -> 咼(咼) -> 呙 as variant
etymology.interpretation: The character 呙 (guō, "pot") uses the mouth radical 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") to suggest an opening or cavity, while 冎(冎) provides the phonetic indication. Initially represented by 咼(咼), it evolved into a variant form 呙.
